title: centella glabrata var. bracteata
intro: Centella glabrata var. bracteata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella glabrata var. bracteata include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for brain health and neurological disorders. Centella glabrata var. bracteata can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
